query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_scans, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN primary_domain LIKE 'test-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'get-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'trpc-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'threat-model-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'campaigns-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'update-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'asset-test-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'multi-asset-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'scores-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'findings-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'get-scan-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'enterprise-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'msp-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'saas-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'paas-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'iaas-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'mixed_hosting-%' OR primary_domain LIKE 'other-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as test_scans,
  SUM(CASE WHEN primary_domain NOT LIKE 'test-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'get-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'trpc-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'threat-model-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'campaigns-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'update-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'asset-test-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'multi-asset-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'scores-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'findings-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'get-scan-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'enterprise-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'msp-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'saas-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'paas-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'iaas-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'mixed_hosting-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'other-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as real_scans
FROM domain_intel_scans;

  SUM(CASE WHEN primary_domain NOT LIKE 'test-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'get-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'trpc-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'threat-model-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'campaigns-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'update-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'asset-test-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'multi-asset-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'scores-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'findings-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'get-scan-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'enterprise-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'msp-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'saas-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'paas-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'iaas-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'mixed_hosting-%' AND primary_domain NOT LIKE 'other-%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as real_scans
FROM domain_intel_scans;
